english_script:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 24 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about AI product manager skills. The video was from a tech expert. It shared the key skills needed for this job.

AI product managers are different from normal product managers. They need to know both AI and product work. The video said there are three main skill areas.

First, you need to understand AI technology. You do not need to code. But you must know what AI can and cannot do. This helps you make good product plans.

Second, you need to work with data. AI products use a lot of data. You must know how to find the right data. You also need to check if the data is good.

Third, you need to think about ethics. AI can be unfair or unsafe. You must make sure your product is fair and safe for everyone.

The video also said AI PMs must learn fast. AI changes every day. You need to read and try new things often.

From this I learned that AI product management is a special job. It needs a mix of skills. I want to learn more about this area.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
大家好，我是Lulu。日常英语练习的第24天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我观看了一个关于AI产品经理技能的视频。这个视频来自一位技术专家。它分享了这份工作所需的关键技能。

AI产品经理与普通产品经理不同。他们需要同时了解AI和产品工作。视频提到有三个主要技能领域。

首先，你需要理解AI技术。你不需要会编程。但你必须知道AI能做什么和不能做什么。这有助于你制定好的产品计划。

其次，你需要处理数据。AI产品使用大量数据。你必须知道如何找到正确的数据。你还需要检查数据是否优质。

第三，你需要考虑伦理问题。AI可能不公平或不安全。你必须确保你的产品对每个人都公平且安全。

视频还提到AI产品经理必须快速学习。AI每天都在变化。你需要经常阅读和尝试新事物。

从中我了解到AI产品管理是一项特殊的工作。它需要多种技能的混合。我想更多地了解这个领域。

谢谢收听，明天见。
concise_english:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 24 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about AI product manager skills. The video shared three key skill areas.

First, know AI technology. You don't need to code. But know what AI can do.

Second, work with data. Find good data for AI products.

Third, think about ethics. Make sure AI is fair and safe.

The video said AI PMs must learn fast. AI changes quickly.

From this I learned that AI product management needs special skills.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.

首先，了解AI技术。你不需要编程。但要知道AI能做什么。

其次，处理数据。为AI产品找到好的数据。

第三，考虑伦理。确保AI公平且安全。

视频说AI产品经理必须快速学习。AI变化很快。

从中我了解到AI产品管理需要特殊技能。

谢谢收听，明天见。
